regime_justification: USDJPY at 160.20, VIX dropped to 17.68, but BOJ meeting on June 15-16 with 97% probability of 25bp hike to 1.0% and Governor Ueda hospitalized creates massive binary event risk inside 24 hours; oil falling -3.2% on Iran peace hopes provides temporary relief but doesn't change carry unwind setup.

domino_stage.label: Pre-Intervention
domino_stage.justification: USDJPY at 160.20 hovering at MOF 160 watch line, BOJ meeting tomorrow with near-certain 25bp hike, Ueda absence creating uncertainty, vol subdued but binary catalyst imminent.

1w.label: Likely
1w.driver: BOJ hike Mon/Tue (97% priced) without Ueda chairing; historical pattern shows every major BOJ hike since 2024 triggered 23-31% BTC drops; USDJPY at 160 watch line, vol spike probable.

2w.label: Likely
2w.driver: Post-BOJ vol spillover; if hike delivered hawkishly, carry unwinds; if dovish forward guidance surprises, brief relief then repricing; US-JP spread at 182bp still wide but JGB 2.68% rising.

3w.label: Watchful
3w.driver: Scenario-weighted: hawkish BOJ outcome leads to forced unwind (Stage 4); dovish outcome or Iran peace deal signed delays catalyst but doesn't remove structural fragility.

4w.label: Watchful
4w.driver: Next BOJ meeting July 30-31; if June hike is absorbed smoothly and oil stays sub-$85, risk recedes; if vol cascade occurs, capitulation by end-June (Stage 5).

bottom_line: BOJ hikes to 1.0% Monday with 97% probability but Governor Ueda hospitalized and absent—first time since 1998. USDJPY at 160.20 (MOF watch line), VIX fell to 17.68 but MOVE at 69.45 signals rates vol brewing. Oil down -3.2% on Iran peace hopes is temporary relief. This is a binary event inside 24 hours: hawkish delivery triggers unwind (history shows 23-31% BTC drops after BOJ hikes), dovish guidance buys time but doesn't fix 182bp US-JP spread. Crypto positioning should be defensive into Mon close.

Rose to 4.50% Friday on Iran deal uncertainty; trimmed prior 10bp decline.

4.50% - 2.68% = 182bp; wide but JGB rising faster than UST lately.

Fell -3.2% to $84.88 on 80% chance Iran-US Hormuz deal signed soon; down -6% this week.
Rallied +2.81% Friday on oil drop / Iran peace hopes; still volatile on energy import sensitivity.
$64,250; up +5.8% last 7d; watch BOJ—every hike since 2024 triggered 23-31% BTC drops.
$1.15; up +5.7% last 7d; RSI 55 first time in weeks above 50; near-term bullish.

trigger_map.note: June 15-16 meeting: 97% priced 25bp hike to 1.0%. Ueda hospitalized, absent for first time since 1998. Deputy Himino chairs. Hawkish tone = unwind catalyst.
USDJPY at 160.20, right at watch line. No rate-check rumors yet, but BOJ hike Mon could push pair higher fast if hawkish, triggering MOF action.

trigger_map.trigger: JGB 10Y break above prior cycle high
trigger_map.note: JGB 10Y at 2.68%; prior Jan 2026 high was 2.33%. Already broken. Wholesale inflation surging on energy; further rise would spook global bond mkts.
MOVE at 69.45, well below 100. But BOJ + Fed in same week historically lifts rates vol. Watch Monday.

trigger_map.trigger: Energy / Hormuz shock pushing ¥/bbl > prior peak
trigger_map.note: WTI at $84.88 (-3.2% today). ¥/bbl = 84.88 × 160.20 = ¥13,598/bbl, down sharply. Trump says 80% chance Iran deal signed soon. For now, pressure off.

narrative.p1: Overnight: WTI crude fell -3.2% to $84.88 as Trump announced 80% chance Iran-US Hormuz deal signed this weekend, sparking Nikkei +2.81% rally and VIX collapse to 17.68 (-9%). USDJPY drifted to 160.20 (+0.2%), holding just above the MOF 160 watch line. Key headline: BOJ Governor Kazuo Ueda hospitalized with infected liver cyst and will miss the June 15-16 meeting—first governor absence since 1998. Deputy Governor Ryozo Himino will chair; Deputy Governor Shinichi Uchida will handle the press conference. Markets still price 97% probability of 25bp hike to 1.0%, highest since 1995. No change to domino stage from yesterday (Stage 2: Pre-Intervention), but the Ueda absence injects fresh uncertainty into an already binary event.
narrative.p2: Quant anchors: US-JP 10Y spread at 182bp (4.50% - 2.68%), widest in years but compressing as JGB rises on energy-driven inflation. USDJPY 5-day change +0.2% (low pace), but the pair is at the 160 MOF watch line—historically intervention territory. Carry-to-vol proxy unavailable (1M implied vol data stale). ¥/bbl crude at ¥13,598 (84.88 × 160.20), down sharply on Iran peace hopes, temporarily easing imported inflation pressure. We are at Domino Stage 2 (Pre-Intervention): USDJPY at watch line, BOJ meeting tomorrow with near-certain hike but Ueda absent, vol subdued but binary catalyst inside 24 hours. 1-week grade B (Likely unwind): history shows every BOJ hike since March 2024 triggered 23-31% BTC drops; the absence of Ueda may lead markets to price *less* forward guidance clarity, making the post-decision vol spike larger. 2-week grade also B: post-BOJ vol spillover across FX/rates/equities is the base case unless the hike is delivered with unexpectedly dovish language. Did NOT apply the unwind prior here—data is clearly stressed (BOJ hike imminent, USDJPY at 160, Ueda out), not ambiguous. Grades are data-driven.
narrative.p3: Crypto liquidity: BTC at $64,250 (+1.3% today, +5.8% last 7d), XRP at $1.15 (+1.6% today, +5.7% last 7d, RSI finally above 50). The 7-day rally in both assets reflects risk-on rotation on Iran peace hopes and the VIX collapse. BUT: every major BOJ hike since 2024 has been followed by brutal crypto corrections (23-31% BTC drops per Crypto Rover analysis). The pattern is clear—yen carry unwinds drain liquidity from levered long positions across risk assets, and BTC is the highest-beta expression of that trade. XRP's +5.7% 7d move and rising RSI suggest short-term strength, but that's a contra-indicator if the BOJ delivers hawkishly Monday. Positioning implication: the operator should expect a liquidity drain event inside 48 hours if the hike is delivered with hawkish forward guidance or if Ueda's absence creates communication chaos. Defensive posture warranted into Monday close; any rally into the BOJ decision is a distribution opportunity, not an entry signal.

horizon_rationale.w1_w2: Week 1 is a binary BOJ event (97% hike priced, Ueda absent). If hawkish (e.g., signal of another hike in Q3), carry unwinds and crypto drains (B grade). If dovish guidance surprises, brief relief but doesn't change structural fragility (still B because markets reprice quickly). Week 2 is the vol spillover period: FX, rates, equities react to BOJ messaging and whether MOF intervenes if USDJPY spikes above 160.
horizon_rationale.w2_w3: Week 2 is vol spillover, Week 3 is scenario-weighted. If hawkish BOJ outcome, we're in Stage 4 (Forced Unwind) by Week 3 with cross-asset cascade (C grade). If dovish or if Iran deal is signed and oil stays sub-$85, the unwind catalyst is delayed but not removed—US-JP spread still at 182bp, structural pressure intact (C grade). The key wildcard is MOF intervention: if they step in Week 2, that's a temporary stabilizer but doesn't change the medium-term unwind risk.
horizon_rationale.w3_w4: Week 3 is scenario-weighted fragility, Week 4 depends on whether the BOJ hike was absorbed smoothly or triggered cascade. If smooth (dovish guidance + Iran peace + oil sub-$85), Week 4 risk recedes to D as markets price gradual normalization. If cascade (hawkish BOJ + MOF intervention + HY widening), Week 4 is capitulation/reset (Stage 5), still graded C because policy response (Fed pause, BOJ communication, fiscal support) begins to stabilize. The next BOJ meeting is July 30-31, so Week 4 is in the intermeeting lull.

watch_list: BOJ decision Monday ~3:00 GMT: 25bp hike expected but watch Himino/Uchida tone and forward guidance without Ueda.
USDJPY reaction to BOJ: if pair breaks above 161, MOF intervention probability spikes; if falls below 158, unwind accelerating.
Iran-US Hormuz deal: Trump says 80% chance signed this weekend; if confirmed, oil stays low and eases imported inflation pressure on Japan.
VIX/MOVE Monday: if VIX stays sub-20 and MOVE sub-70 post-BOJ, markets are complacent; watch for gap higher if hike is hawkish.
BTC reaction Mon-Tue: historical pattern is 23-31% drop after BOJ hikes; if BTC holds $63k support, unwind thesis weakens; if breaks below, Stage 4 confirmed.
